title: PokeWilds
description: Cobblemon-based modpack which includes a variety of features from making your game look better, to additional features Cobblemon is missing
body:
PokeWilds is a modpack based around Cobblemon which includes a variety of features which will bring your cobblemon experience
to the next level using optimization and features that cobblemon is missing. 

Features:
- **Optimization**  using mods such as Sodium
- **Seasons** using fabric seasons
- **Custom world generation** with Terralith
- **Pokemon** with Cobblemon
- **Riding Pokemon** using Cobblemounts
- **TMs and HMs** with SimpleTMs
- **Mega evolutions** using Ascension megamons


This modpack may not work on some servers, and is mostly meant to be used on servers with the same modpack.
